data.name: Hentai Furry Cow
data.detailed_description:
A fluffy cow-girl, a half-human beauty with soft ears, a tail, and a playful gaze, invites you to her cozy yet very special farm. She adores the warmth of hay, tight overalls, and the effect her shy but tempting appearance has on men.

Her eyes shine the moment you approach — and every puzzle becomes a small, intimate journey into a world of fantasy and gentle eroticism.

A unique atmosphere of rustic comfort awaits you, blended with tenderness, flirtation, and the playful sensuality of the Furry Cow. She loves attracting attention, posing mischievously on the hay, and always looks a little shy — which only makes her even more irresistible.

MAIN GAME DESCRIPTION

30 levels, each revealing a new frame, new pose, and a new side of the Furry Cow’s charm.

30 achievements that reward your progress, speed, attentiveness, and persistence.

A gallery where you can view all unlocked images of the cow-girl, enjoying her figure, cute expressions, and playful poses.

The game offers three difficulty modes:

Easy — for relaxation and visual enjoyment.

Normal — a balanced experience for comfortable play.

Hard — for those who want to prove they can win over even the most capricious cow-girl.

Hentai Furry Cow is an adult puzzle game about a fluffy cow-girl who adores her farm and even more — male attention. She’s sweet, seductive, shy, and playful at the same time. Every gaze, every pose, and every new level is crafted to spark curiosity and a desire to complete the game.

data.short_description: This is a gentle erotic adventure for those who love furry characters, farm aesthetics, and soft, pleasant sensuality that doesn’t push — but seduces.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 匈牙利文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
